result:
I don't have the capability to view image files directly. Could you either:

1. Share a description of what the chart shows (the data, axes, countries, wine percentages, etc.), or
2. Describe the chart contents so I can answer your question about which country has the highest percentage of wine?

Alternatively, if this is part of a derendering/analysis task, I could help analyze the underlying data if you can point me to the data files.
